matched_strings: var columns = tableColumnMap[tableName]; if(!columns) {columns = tableColumnMap[CreateTableAliasMapping(myEditor.getModel().getValue())[tableName]]} if (columns) { suggestions = columns.map(function(column) { return column; }); } else { return {} } } return { suggestions: suggestions }}});

function CreateTableAliasMapping(text) { 										 const aliasMapping = {}; 										 const regex = /(\w+)\s+AS\s+(\w+)/gi; 										 let match; 										 while ((match = regex.exec(text)) !== null) { 											const tableName = match[1]; 											const alias = match[2]; 											aliasMapping[alias] = tableName; 										 }										 return aliasMapping;									  }
